summary: Iteration 132: Pricing Engine Refactoring Verification - All tests passed. The 1385-line monolithic PricingEnginePage.jsx was successfully refactored into 16 modular components under /app/frontend/src/pages/pricing/. Behavior unchanged, all data-testid attributes preserved, all API integrations working.
passed_tests: ✅ Pricing Engine page loads with data-testid='pricing-engine-page'
✅ StatCards shows: Toplam Kural=2, Aktif Kural=2, Kanal=4, Aktif Promosyon=2, Guardrail=1
✅ CacheStatsBar shows: Entries, Hits, Misses, Hit Rate, Evictions, Mem
✅ All 5 tabs present: Simulator, Rules, Channels, Promotions, Guardrails
✅ Simulator calculation returns result with sim-metrics
✅ TraceBar shows trace_id, cache status (HIT/MISS), latency, cache_key
✅ GuardrailWarnings shows violation message with expected/actual values
✅ PipelineExplainer shows full pricing pipeline with each step
✅ Diagnostics panel opens with 6/6 diagnostic cards (diag-hit-rate, diag-entries, diag-memory, diag-evictions, diag-uptime, diag-suppliers)
✅ Telemetry panel opens with supplier breakdown and alert history
✅ Rules tab loads with distribution-rules-tab and add-rule-btn
✅ Channels tab loads with channels-tab and add-channel-btn
✅ Promotions tab loads with promotions-tab and add-promo-btn
✅ Guardrails tab loads with guardrails-tab and add-guardrail-btn
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully completed: PricingEnginePage.jsx reduced from 1385 to 182 lines

Component breakdown: StatCards, AlertBanner, CacheStatsBar, GlobalDiagnosticsPanel, CacheTelemetryPanel, PricingSimulatorTab, DistributionRulesTab, ChannelsTab, PromotionsTab, GuardrailsTab, TraceBar, PipelineExplainer, RulePrecedenceViewer, GuardrailWarnings, pricingApi.js, pricingConstants.js
All data-testid attributes preserved correctly from original monolith
State ownership clear: main orchestrator holds shared state (stats, cacheStats, telemetry, diagnostics, alerts, warmingLoading), tab components manage their own local state
API calls centralized in pricingApi.js helper using axios
Constants/helpers extracted to pricingConstants.js (CHANNEL_ICONS, CHANNEL_COLORS, GUARDRAIL_LABELS, GUARDRAIL_ICONS, STEP_COLORS, fmtCurrency)
Props drilling is reasonable - diagnostics/telemetry passed to CacheStatsBar which renders sub-panels

All components have proper data-testid for testing: pricing-engine-page, pricing-stat-cards, cache-stats-bar, diagnostics-panel, telemetry-panel, price-simulator, distribution-rules-tab, channels-tab, promotions-tab, guardrails-tab, etc.
Backend endpoints unmodified and all working correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (23/23 tests passed after retry of transient network error)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 132 verified pure refactoring of PricingEnginePage.jsx. The 1385-line monolith was split into 16 components. All functionality identical. Key components: StatCards (5 stat cards), CacheStatsBar (cache metrics + toggle buttons for diagnostics/telemetry), GlobalDiagnosticsPanel (6 diagnostic cards), CacheTelemetryPanel (supplier breakdown, alert history, invalidation log), PricingSimulatorTab (form + result with TraceBar, GuardrailWarnings, PipelineExplainer, sim-metrics, RulePrecedenceViewer), DistributionRulesTab/ChannelsTab/PromotionsTab/GuardrailsTab (CRUD interfaces). All data-testid preserved. Backend not modified.
